accounting-created-111: Accounting entry created in fiscal year %codejercicio% with the concept: %concepto%
exists-accounting-111: An accounting entry already exists in fiscal year %codejercicio% with the concept: %concepto%
model-111-p: Form 111 is a quarterly statement of the personal income tax withholdings made to workers, professionals and businessmen.
model-190-p: Form 190 is an annual statement of the income tax withheld from employees, professionals, and entrepreneurs.
